name.description: Friendly name for the ruleset, used in UIs and logs to help administrators identify the ruleset.

phaseName.description: Name of the phase during which the ruleset is evaluated (for example, httprequestfirewallmanaged, httprequestfirewallcustom, or provider-specific phase names). This indicates when in the request/response lifecycle the rules apply.

rulesetId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the ruleset by Cloudflare or the integration.
